pageContext.name: The Book of Boba Fett™ A New Beginning
pageContext.description: I'm the crime lord. He's supposed to pay me.   Everything Boba Fett has done in his life, including escaping from the hungry maw of the Sarlacc™ pit, pales in comparison to the new story he is writing. With Fennec Shand™ at his right hand as both muscle and advisor, and his bounty hunting skills at the ready, he now runs the crime syndicate on Tatooine™ where Jabba the Hutt™ used to hold court. Time will ultimately decide how Boba Fett's story will play out.  The Book of Boba Fett™ Collection presented by Thomas Kinkade Studios is a series of Limited Edition Art that captures iconic scenes from each chapter of the Star Wars™ live-action series. These lifelike works of art beautifully portray epic Star Wars stories and characters, combining the luminous techniques of Thomas Kinkade Studios with the signature style of the artist, Brian Rood.  Don't miss your chance to own The Book of Boba Fett™ A New Beginning art print. A truly beautiful addition to any Star Wars art gallery.
